creator: ayuzhaninov@openstat.ru
text:
- Update to 2.4
- Remove textproc/flex dependency - /usr/bin/flex from base system can be used
- Don't patch path to flex - it is useless, anyway command path/name from
  /usr/local/lib/postgresql/pgxs/src/makefiles/pgxs.mk is used by plproxy Makefile
- Starting from PostgreSQL 9.1 extensions installed in the dir share/postgresql/extension

Port maintainer (skv@FreeBSD.org) is cc'd.
